message:
feat(scheduler): add pop_any_lane_with_hint for single-call multi-lane dispatch

Add PriorityScheduler::pop_any_lane_with_hint(rng_hint, now) that checks
cancel, timed (deadline-aware), and ready lanes in priority order within
a single method call. Returns a (lane_tag, task_id) tuple where lane_tag
encodes the source lane (0=cancel, 1=timed, 2=ready).

This avoids the overhead of separate lock acquisitions when the caller
would otherwise check each lane sequentially via pop_cancel_with_rng,
pop_timed, and pop_ready. The timed lane uses deadline-aware dispatch
(only pops when deadline <= now), consistent with the recently added
pop_with_lane_if_due semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
